mfa_code.description: TOTP code if MFA is enabled

ApiKeyAuth.description: Environment API key for server-side or client-side SDK access
ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained from /v1/auth/login or /v1/auth/register

info.description: Complete API reference for FeatureSignals — feature flag management platform.
info.title: FeatureSignals API

get.description: Returns API documentation metadata including the OpenAPI spec URL.
Returns the complete OpenAPI 3.0.3 specification for the FeatureSignals API. Used by the Scalar playground and code generation tools.
Returns service health status.
Returns internal KPI analytics.

delete.description: Revokes and permanently deletes an API key.

post.description: Generates a new key value with a grace period for the old key.

get.description: Returns approval requests for the org, optionally filtered by status.

post.description: Submits a new change request for review.

get.description: Returns a single approval request.

post.description: Approves or rejects a pending approval request. If approved, the change is applied.

get.description: Returns a paginated audit log of all organization actions.
Exports the full audit log as JSON.

post.description: Verifies the OTP code and completes registration, returning JWT tokens.
Starts the signup flow by sending an OTP to the provided email.
Authenticates a user and returns JWT tokens. Supports MFA verification.
Revokes the current refresh token and ends the session.
Removes MFA for the user after verifying their password.
Generates a new TOTP secret and returns it with a QR code URI. MFA is not active until verified.

get.description: Returns the current MFA status for the authenticated user.

post.description: Validates a TOTP code and activates MFA for the user.
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token pair.
Resends the OTP for a pending signup.
Sends a verification link to the user's email address.
Exchanges a single-use one-time token for a full JWT pair. Used for cross-domain authentication after payment redirects.

get.description: Verifies the user's email using a token from the verification link. Redirects to dashboard on success.

post.description: Cancels the current subscription. Supports at_period_end flag.
Initiates a payment session via the org's configured gateway (PayU or Stripe).
Handles PayU payment callback. Redirects to dashboard.
Handles PayU payment failure redirect.
Generates a URL to the Stripe billing portal.
Processes Stripe webhook events.

get.description: Returns the current subscription plan, status, and renewal date.
Returns current billing period usage: seats, projects, environments.
Returns deployment mode, billing status, and regions enablement.
Returns all evaluated flag values for a client environment. Used by client-side SDKs.
Streams the complete org data as a JSON download.
Returns all API keys for an environment.

post.description: Creates a new API key. The full key is returned only on creation.
Evaluates a feature flag for the given context and returns its value, variation key, and reason.
Evaluates multiple flags (max 100) for the given context in a single request.

get.description: Returns plan capabilities and their enabled state.

post.description: Submits user feedback about the product.

get.description: Returns the IP allowlist configuration.

put.description: Creates or updates the IP allowlist.

get.description: Returns all members of the current organization.

post.description: Invites a user to the organization by email.

delete.description: Removes a team member from the organization.

get.description: Returns per-environment permissions for a member.

put.description: Replaces per-environment permissions for a member.

get.description: Returns evaluation counts and latency metrics.

post.description: Resets evaluation counters.

get.description: Returns A/B experiment impression counts.

post.description: Forces the in-memory impression buffer to persist.

get.description: Returns the current onboarding progress for the authenticated org.
Returns canonical pricing for all plans. Public endpoint.
Returns region-adjust pricing configuration.
Returns all projects the authenticated user has access to.

post.description: Creates a new project with default environments.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a project and all associated resources.

get.description: Returns a single project by ID.
Returns all environments in a project.

post.description: Creates a new environment in the specified project.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an environment and its flag states.

post.description: Evaluates all flags for two targets and returns a diff.

get.description: Returns per-flag evaluation distribution for the environment.
Returns all flag states for a given environment in one batch.

post.description: Evaluates all flags for a specific target context.

get.description: Returns all feature flags in a project.

post.description: Creates a new feature flag in the project.

get.description: Returns per-flag differences between two environments.

post.description: Bulk-promotes selected flags from source to target environment.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a feature flag and all associated state.

get.description: Returns a single feature flag by key.

put.description: Updates the flag definition (name, description, tags, category, status).

get.description: List version history for a flag with pagination

parameters.description: Number of history records to return
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Number of history records to skip
parameters.name: offset

get.description: Get a specific version of a flag with diff from previous version

post.description: Roll back a flag to a previous version

get.description: Get agent-readable flag details

post.description: Evaluate a single flag with <5ms latency
Evaluate up to 50 flags in bulk
Create a flag via agent API

get.description: Returns the flag's state for a specific environment.

put.description: Updates the flag's enabled status, rules, rollout percentage, or schedule for a specific environment.

post.description: Instantly disables the flag in the specified environment. Use for emergency rollbacks.
Copies the flag state from one environment to another.

get.description: Returns all segments in a project.

post.description: Creates a new user segment with targeting rules.

get.description: Returns a single segment by key.

put.description: Updates a segment's name, description, match type, or rules.

get.description: Returns all available data regions for account creation.
Returns all custom role templates for the org.

post.description: Creates a new custom role template.

get.description: Returns a single custom role.

post.description: Submits an Enterprise plan inquiry.

get.description: Lists users via SCIM 2.0 protocol.

post.description: Provisions a user via SCIM 2.0.

get.description: Gets a single user via SCIM 2.0.
Returns the SSO configuration. Secrets are masked.

post.description: Creates or updates the SSO configuration.
Validates the SSO configuration by testing the IdP connection.

get.description: Returns the SSO configuration type and login URL for an organization.
Redirects to the OIDC provider.
Handles the OIDC provider callback.

post.description: Receives the SAML response from the IdP.

get.description: Redirects to the IdP for SAML authentication.
Returns SAML SP metadata XML.
Returns the current local status of the FeatureSignals service.
Returns the global status across all regions.
Returns historical status records.
Returns current SLA compliance metrics.
Opens a Server-Sent Events stream for real-time flag updates.

post.description: Records a flag impression for A/B testing analytics.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the authenticated user's account with a 30-day grace period.

get.description: Returns a JSON export of all personal data for the authenticated user.

put.description: Updates the user's email notification preferences.

get.description: Returns dismissed UI hint IDs.

post.description: Marks a UI hint as dismissed.

get.description: Returns all configured webhooks for the org.

post.description: Creates a new webhook endpoint for flag change events.

get.description: Returns a single webhook by ID.

put.description: Updates a webhook's URL, events, secret, or enabled state.

get.description: Returns delivery history for a webhook.
Serves a self-contained Swagger UI page for exploring the API interactively.
Returns the OpenAPI specification as JSON.

tags.name: Evaluation

tags.name: Insights

tags.name: User
